## Skill Request

**Skill name (or existing skill to improve):**

**What problem does it solve for PMs doing agentic engineering?**

**Trigger phrase(s):**
_How would you naturally ask Claude to activate this skill?_

**What does it output or do?**

**Dependencies (if any):**
_Does it require other skills, tools, or MCP servers?_

**Priority for you:**
- [ ] Blocker — can't do my PM work without it
- [ ] High — would use it daily
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — edge case

**Additional context:**
